name: yarrow
summary: Mechanism context: digestive support, anti-inflammatory, women's health. Safety: Asteraceae-family herb; allergy is a practical concern. Avoid high-dose or prolonged internal use without review.. Interactions tracked: Potential additive effects with anticoagulants/antiplatelets, possible allergy cross-reactivity with ragweed-family plants..

Avoid high-dose or prolonged internal use without review.. safetyNotes: Asteraceae-family herb; allergy is a practical concern. Avoid high-dose or prolonged internal use without review.
contraindications: bleeding disorders or anticoagulant therapy without clinician review.
interactions: possible allergy cross-reactivity with ragweed-family plants.
preparation: Flowering tops are used as tea, tincture, compress, or topical preparation; essential oil use requires separate safety review.
